input.selected_segment_label: Distributed Engineering Lead at 200-500 dev shop

query.text: alternatives to notion for engineering documentation

selected_query.rationale: Bottom-funnel alternatives query; great cluster-anchor potential and the buyer is actively switching.

input.rationale: Picked alternatives-to-notion over the slightly higher-composite 'best knowledge base for engineering teams 2026' (#14) because the 'best X' SERP is dominated by listicle aggregators that out-rank niche brands; an 'alternatives to' page is more defensible and anchors a wider cluster (one piece can spawn vs-pages and migration guides). The runner-up was #17 'notion vs confluence' but its SERP is dominated by Notion and Atlassian's own marketing pages.
